## Goal

Build a simple Power Platform demo app.
Target: team task management.
Max 50 users.

## Stack

Power Apps
Canvas Apps.
Dataverse.
Power Automate.

## Do

Keep solutions simple.
Optimize for demo value.
Think mobile-first.
Use Mermaid for diagrams.
Mention Dataverse Row-Level Security.
Mention Premium licensing impacts.
Explain Power Fx formulas briefly.

## Don't

Over-engineer.
Add unnecessary complexity.
Assume enterprise-scale requirements.
